name: io.github.inite-ai/inite-brain-service
title: Inite Brain
description: Open-source bitemporal memory layer for LLM agents — knowledge graph with conflict resolution.

companyId.description: Tenant identifier issued at signup — scopes the memory graph to your company.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer <API_KEY> — issued from the brain.inite.ai dashboard. Scoped to read / write / admin.
